# libqmi_version: 1.30
# source: bench Jetson Orin NX, JetPack 5.1.5, Ubuntu 20.04, libqmi 1.30.4
# modem: SWI9X50C (NOT the SWI9X30C that the upstream-Debian standard fixture uses)
# captured: 2026-05-12 during phase 05.4 hotfix deploy walk
# distinguishing trait: SINGULAR "Device revision retrieved" header (no "s"),
# and ONLY the Revision: line — no Boot code: line. libqmi adapts the header
# wording to the field count.
[/dev/cdc-wdm0] Device revision retrieved:
	Revision: 'SWI9X50C_01.14.03.00 b06bd3 jenkins 2020/09/23 10:53:35'
